message:
🔧 Make weekly releases stable with -weekly suffix in name

- Weekly releases produce stable versions (v0.3.7) for the tag
- Release name includes -weekly suffix (v0.3.7-weekly) for clarity
- GoReleaser updated to use RELEASE_NAME env var for release title

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -67,5 +67,7 @@ release:
   github:
     owner: kubestellar
     name: console
+  # Use RELEASE_NAME env var if set, otherwise fall back to tag
+  name_template: "{{ if .Env.RELEASE_NAME }}{{ .Env.RELEASE_NAME }}{{ else }}{{ .Tag }}{{ end }}"
   draft: false
   prerelease: auto
